title: Objectives
content: Objectives To empower ambitious students with resources to build various projects. To discuss recent developments in the field of electronics and communication. To expose students to challenges and new technologies in the field of electronics and communication. To come up with innovative ideas to tackle real-life problems. To improve students’ technical skills through regular meetings and sessions. To initiate financial support for various events and projects from funding agencies. To promote the innovation, research and patent filing with the students.
